headline: Eaton Reports Record First Quarter 2026 Results, with Accelerating Growth in Sales, Orders and Backlog, and Raises 2026 Organic Growth Guidance to 10% from 8% at the Midpoint
summary: DUBLIN, May 05, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) today announced that first quarter 2026 earnings per share were $2.22. Excluding charges of $0.29 per share related to intangible amortization, $0.22 per share related to acquisitions and divestitures, and $0.08 per share related to a multi-year restructuring program, adjusted earnings per share were $2.81, a first quarter record.
